description: Composition Purple and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with ruffles, a split neckline, a full buttoned placket with ruffles, short puff sleeves and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Wash and dry inside out Do not bleach, do not wring Flat dry in shade or tumble dry Warm iron This stylish shirt with its bright checks is kept feminine with elasticated sleeves and a slim collar, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for a cowgirl look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33"
